titlestmt.author: Compiled by Julia Parker and Nancy Dean

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2019-11-23 23:52:42 +0000.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Notes, correspondence, reports, bulletins, articles and photographs.
did.abstract: Materials relating to Turner's career as professor and agricultural engineer.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes reports and minutes of the New York Farm Electrification Council and notes, data and correspondence pertaining to bulk milk cooling and other projects; correspondence concerning the work of the Council, agricultural engineering, and the installation and operation of electrically powered farm equipment, as well as correspondence and material concerning the American Society of Agricultural Engineers; reports, bulletins, articles, and addresses by Turner and others concerning the use of electricity on the farm, with related photographs. Also, notes on tile drainage and material for his course Agricultural Engineering 101.
Also, paper on "The Poole Electric Clock," by Professor Turner, 1987, published in the Bulletin of the National Association of Watch and Clock Collectors, Inc., August 1988.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Clesson Nathan Turner papers, #21-11-810. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

Drainage.

Dairy engineering.
Agricultural engineering.
